name: Marie Calendar's Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the corn muffin mix according to the directions on the box.
2. In a separate bowl, prepare the yellow cake mix according to the directions on the box.
3. Pour the prepared yellow cake mix into the prepared corn muffin mix and stir well until combined.
4. Grease a 9x12x2 inch pan.
5. Pour the mixture into the greased pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
